name: UpGuard
description: UpGuard provides vendor risk management and external attack surface monitoring with automated security ratings and risk detection.

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to UpGuard at https://cyber-risk.upguard.com
2. Click the Settings icon (top-right)
3. Go to the API tab
4. Create a new API key or copy your existing one
5. Enter the API key above (no prefix needed)

checks.name: Monitoring & Alerting
checks.description: Checks vendor risk scores in UpGuard to identify third-party vendors with low security ratings.

checks.name: Incident Response
checks.description: Checks for active security risks detected by UpGuard for your organization's external attack surface.
